description_long: This is a brown leather briefcase with a rectangular body and a large front flap secured by two metal buckles. The bag features a long, adjustable shoulder strap made of the same brown material, attached to the sides with metal loops and buckles. The main compartment is spacious and partially open, revealing a rolled-up parchment or document inside. The surface of the briefcase has a slightly worn, matte finish, with visible seams and subtle shading that suggests a soft but sturdy construction. Metal hardware, including buckles and strap attachments, adds functional and decorative detail. The overall design is practical and classic, suitable for carrying documents or personal items in an urban environment.
description: A brown leather briefcase with a front flap, metal buckles, and a long shoulder strap, partially open to reveal a rolled-up document inside.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main flap, both buckles, and the shoulder strap draped in front.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back panel, strap attachment, and the side buckle.
description_view_2: Front angled view with the flap open, clearly displaying the rolled-up document inside the main compartment.
description_view_3: Side-rear view focusing on the side buckle, strap, and the visible rolled-up document protruding from the open compartment.
attribute_handle_type: One long, flexible shoulder strap made of leather, attached with metal loops and buckles on each side; the strap is adjustable and non-retractable.
attribute_lock_mechanism: Two metal buckle closures on the front flap, each with a strap and pin mechanism.
